## Summary

- 

## Checklist

- [ ] No PII or sensitive data
- [ ] Not dangerous/unsafe content
- [ ] Frontmatter complete (`title`, `date`, `summary`, `draft`)
- [ ] Content dates are set to current/past time (future date only if intentionally scheduled)
- [ ] Changelog updated (or intentionally not needed)
- [ ] `hugo --gc --minify` passes
- [ ] Links validated
- [ ] Preview checked
